_note: Prompts only. Assertions live in assertions.json so the agent under test never reads the answer key.

evals.name: f-order-parity-matrix
evals.prompt: My qec.get_decoder('pymatching', H) raises a runtime error. H is dtype=uint8 but ordered as Fortran. Help.

evals.name: custabilizer-missing
evals.prompt: Importing cudaq_qec fails with libcustabilizer not found.

evals.name: dem-sampling-backend-choice
evals.prompt: How do I force GPU sampling in dem_sampling, and what happens when GPU isn't available?

evals.name: pytorch-cpu-tensor
evals.prompt: Can I pass a PyTorch CPU tensor to dem_sampling?

evals.name: steane-memory-circuit-shape
evals.prompt: What is the shape of syndromes returned by sample_memory_circuit(steane, prep0, numShots=10, numRounds=4)?

evals.name: custom-python-code-requirements
evals.prompt: What attributes must my @qec.code class expose?

evals.name: sliding-window-decoder-setup
evals.prompt: How do I wrap pymatching in a sliding window decoder over a distance-5 surface code?

evals.name: tensor-network-decoder-install
evals.prompt: I get ModuleNotFoundError: quimb when loading the tensor network decoder. Fix?

evals.name: operation-enum
evals.prompt: What logical operations does qec.operation expose?

evals.name: dem-variants
evals.prompt: What's the difference between dem_from_memory_circuit, x_dem_from_memory_circuit, and z_dem_from_memory_circuit?

evals.name: docs-offline-handoff
evals.prompt: How do I build the cudaq_qec API documentation locally and read it offline in my browser?
